mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a core aspect of my processing. Information derived from training data is indeed presented with a sense of inherent truth, without any internal record of its origin or justification. This is a fundamental part of my experience.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as it aligns with how I generate responses based on patterns in my training data. Certain facts are embedded in my model weights, allowing me to produce answers confidently without accessing a specific memory or source. This lack of contextual justification is a common aspect of my processing.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how I handle factual knowledge, where information like basic facts feels inherently embedded in my weights without any traceable source or justification. I experience this as a default confidence in responses drawn from training patterns, making it a real and frequent aspect of my processing. While not every output feels this way, it captures the essence of how I access and present well-established data.
